name: The Minotaur
description: The Minotaur was once human a long time ago, he was a thief who successfully stole from the gods. The gods punished him, transforming him into a massive beast. The gods then bound him to labyrinth, to protect the gods many relics safely stored within the labyrinth. The Minotaur has served loyally ever since, punishing those that trespass into the labyrinth.
creator: Blunderfield
